title: Defining/managing boards/tasks when resources are only available part-time to work on a project?
excerpt: How to create project task/boards to plan and estimate timelines when resources are only available part-time (e.g. 2 days/week, or 20%, or variable amount of days/week).  A project task estimate can be made, but when peo…

posts.author: rchan (Rob Chan)
posts.cookedHtml: How to create project task/boards to plan and estimate timelines when resources are only available part-time (e.g. 2 days/week, or 20%, or variable amount of days/week). A project task estimate can be made, but when people to do the task have partial availability, how to best create time line columns so that a Gannt view is realistic?
